improvements.title: Fix 7 failing algorithms to achieve 100% success rate
Add rigorous cache-oblivious algorithm comparison with statistical analysis
Add adaptive compilation with parallel code generation
Replace fully-associative LRU with realistic 8-way set-associative cache model in benchmark harness
improvements.rationale: Critique: 'Cache simulation uses fully-associative LRU model (unrealistic)'. Added SetAssociativeCache as default benchmark model with comparison module.

improvements.title: Add semantic equivalence checking to translation validation
improvements.rationale: Critique: 'Translation validation checks structural invariants but not semantic equivalence'. Added validate_full() method that runs simulation-based semantic comparison.

improvements.title: Add compositional pass verification for sequential pass composition
improvements.rationale: Critique: 'Compositional verification gap: individual transformation passes are tested but their sequential composition is not verified'. Added verification module testing 4 pass compositions across all memory models.

common_finalization.math_rigor_pass: Corrected Theorem 1: O(log n/log log n) overflow requires adaptive k = Omega(log n/log log n), not fixed k >= log B. Fixed k=8 gives O(n^{1/4}) worst-case. Added Proposition 11 (fixed-k bound) and Proposition 12 (data-dependent chain analysis). All proof steps verified against implementation. SSS bound computation matches code.
common_finalization.paper_rewrite: tool_paper.tex: 30 pages (10 main + 20 appendix). Single-column, arxiv style. No author, no GitHub references. Results-oriented. All claims grounded. Corrected math. Added Appendices K (fixed-k regime) and L (data-dependent chains). pdflatex compiles cleanly.
common_finalization.grounding_update: grounding.json v1.0.0 with 35 claims, 5 critique responses mapping each critique to paper section, implementation artifact, and resolution.
common_finalization.readme_rewrite: Developer-focused README with 30-second quickstart, key results table, command reference, and honest limitations.
common_finalization.api_rewrite: API.md updated with all implemented CLI commands and Rust library APIs. Only implemented features documented.
common_finalization.experiments: All 1,476 tests pass. 51/51 algorithms verified. Compilation tested. PDF compiles cleanly (31 pages).
common_finalization.completeness_check: All 5 key critiques addressed: (1) semantic equivalence checking, (2) specializer rule transparency, (3) realistic cache model, (4) fixed k=8 with data-dependent chains, (5) algorithm complexity validation.

verification_pass.pdf: 31 pages, compiles cleanly (pdflatex, no errors, no broken refs)
verification_pass.improvements_verified: All 6 improvements confirmed in code (not stubs): SetAssociativeCache, validate_full, compositional_verification, ProfileGuidedCompiler, parallel_batch, 7 IR transforms in fixer.rs
verification_pass.math_verified: Theorem 1 (HPLT), Lemma 2 (Work Preservation), Prop 11 (fixed-k), Prop 12 (data-dependent chains) all correct. SSS concentration stated correctly.
verification_pass.hallucination_fixes: Fixed '174 property-based tests' to '~130' (verified count). Fixed stale Table 9/12 references in grounding.json.
verification_pass.paper_improvements: Added CRCW-Arbitrary non-determinism limitation. Added generalization scope paragraph. Strengthened Work-Preservation proof sketch with structural induction detail. Expanded repair generality limitation.
verification_pass.grounding_additions: Added 2 new claims: CRCW-Arbitrary deterministic resolution, three failure categories generalization.
